title: Bloom Energy Corporation (BE) - Stock Analysis
text: Simply Wall St provides comprehensive stock analysis of Bloom Energy, assessing financial health, valuation, and growth prospects. The platform's analysis highlights exceptional growth metrics combined with valuation concerns. Q1 2026 revenue of $751.05 million and net income of $70.65 million demonstrate improving profitability. The company's ability to achieve positive operating cash flow of $73.6 million in Q1 indicates improving financial efficiency. Full-year 2026 guidance implies 80% revenue growth midpoint, representing multi-year sustained high growth. Profitability trajectory from non-GAAP EPS guidance of $1.85-$2.25 suggests improving earnings power. The analysis identifies key monitoring points including customer concentration with Oracle and Brookfield representing significant revenue portions. Related-party sales structure warrants transparency regarding terms and sustainability. The company maintains $20 billion backlog providing multi-year revenue visibility. Manufacturing scalability to 2 GW annual capacity represents critical execution metric. Interest coverage of 2.7x net interest coverage suggests moderate leverage levels. The analysis recommends selective exposure given premium valuation but acknowledges exceptional business execution and market opportunity.
